meta.question: Will every execution path in this model eventually terminate at an end event? (Model ID: 4e8df28e6d9f4afe970d06522542e830)
meta.finalAnswer: No. For model ID 4e8df28e6d9f4afe970d06522542e830 (“12345678”), the model’s choreography has exactly 1 EndEvent, and from its StartEvent that EndEvent is reachable. However, there also exists at least one node reachable from the StartEvent from which **no** EndEvent is reachable—so at least one execution path can avoid terminating at an end event.
